name: Canned Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn, green beans, pimiento, celery, green pepper, and onion in a large bowl. Toss lightly.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
3. In a separate container, combine vinegar, vegetable oil, water, and sugar. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Pour the dressing over the vegetable mixture in the large bowl. Gently toss to ensure even distribution of the dressing.
5. Cover the bowl again and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
6. After chilling, drain any excess liquid if needed.
7. Serve the salad in a lettuce-lined bowl.
